message:
refactor(sync,storage): replace PRAGMA foreign_key_check with targeted orphan row queries, extract E2E test helpers

sync/mod.rs — find_post_import_fk_violation:
- Replace the single PRAGMA foreign_key_check call with per-table
  orphan-row queries against an explicit list of 8 FK-backed tables
  (dependencies, labels, comments, events, dirty_issues, export_hashes,
  blocked_issues_cache, child_counters). PRAGMA foreign_key_check
  returns opaque row-ids with no column information; the new approach
  pinpoints exactly which table and column contain the violation, giving
  actionable error messages like "orphaned rows in comments.issue_id".
- Update the unit test assertion to match the new error format.

storage/sqlite.rs — has_missing_issue_reference:
- New pub(crate) helper that runs a COUNT(*) WHERE column NOT IN
  (SELECT id FROM issues) query for a given table/column pair, returning
  a bool. This is the primitive the sync layer uses for per-table FK
  verification.

tests/e2e_routing.rs — extract shared test helpers:
- Extract init_workspace(), configure_external_route(),
  create_issue_and_get_id(), and show_issue_json() helper functions
  from the e2e_routing_update_claim_failure test, reducing ~65 lines
  of duplicated assertion boilerplate to concise one-liner calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
